$comment: XcodeBuildMCP wires Claude Code into the Xcode build/run/test loop for this app (build_sim/test_sim/screenshot/capture_logs, plus device build/install). Add it with: claude mcp add --transport stdio XcodeBuildMCP --scope project -- npx -y xcodebuildmcp@latest . Requires Node/npx on the Mac. The 'device' workflow is enabled because the LiDAR capture path can ONLY be exercised on a real iPhone Pro (the simulator has no LiDAR).
